title: Inconsistent Trie Node Creation Due to Missing Child Node Link

statement.markdown: Create a function insert which inserts a word into a Trie. The function should not handle duplicate words. Words are separated by null characters.
statement.inputFormat: A string of words separated by null characters

examples.explanation: Inserts the words into the Trie

hints.text: The given code does not correctly handle child nodes for each Trie node.
Make sure to properly link child nodes for each Trie node.

editorial.title: Inconsistent Trie Node Creation Due to Missing Child Node Link
editorial.intuition: A Trie is a tree-like data structure that is often used to store a dynamic set or associative array where the keys are usually strings.
editorial.optimalSolution: Create a function insert which inserts a word into a Trie. Make sure to handle each word by traversing the Trie and create a new node when a leaf node is encountered.
